description: This particularly interesting car was first seen at the 1959 Le Mans test day, quickly followed by a competitive appearance in the 12 lap International Grand Touring BRDC race at Silverstone in 1959. In the hands of legendary British racing driver, Stirling Moss, DP199/1 actually won at it's very first outing with a race spec 3.7 litre engine.
creator: Bnuuy
